description_long: This is a two-story house with a prominent gable roof and a large covered front porch supported by square columns. The exterior is clad in horizontal light blue siding with white trim and blue window shutters, giving it a classic, inviting appearance. The roof is steeply pitched and dark brown, with multiple intersecting gables adding architectural interest. Windows are symmetrically arranged, featuring white grilles and blue shutters, and the front facade includes a projecting bay with a decorative gable. The porch wraps partially around the front and side, providing sheltered outdoor space. The overall design suggests a Victorian-inspired style with modern touches, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A two-story, light blue house with a steep gable roof, white trim, blue shutters, and a large covered front porch. The design features symmetrical windows and decorative gables, evoking a classic Victorian-inspired style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, decorative gables, and symmetrical window arrangement with blue shutters.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, additional windows, and the extension of the porch along the side.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate side view displaying a large gable, fewer windows, and the continuation of the siding and trim details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the roof's pitch, upper-story windows, and the side of the porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with a large covered porch, square columns, and decorative gable above the entry
